revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{#if: {{{short|}}} | [[User:AAlertBot|AAlertBot]] for [[Wikipedia:Article alerts|Article Alerts]] | {{mbox | image = [[File:Mail-send-receive.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make breaking changes to this {{{1|{{lc:{{NAMESPACE}}}}}}}, move it, change scope, or nominate it for deletion or deprecation, please notify the [[Wikipedia:Article alerts|Article Alerts]] project at [[:en:Wikipedia talk:Article alerts|Wikipedia talk:Article alerts]] as a courtesy, as this page is used by the [[User:AAlertBot|AAlertBot]] bot to detect and report pages. Thank you!}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --></noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Article_alerts%2FBot_use_warning here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Article_alerts%2FBot_use_warning for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#if: {{{short|}}} | [[User:AAlertBot|AAlertBot]] for [[Wikipedia:Article alerts|Article Alerts]] | {{mbox | image = [[File:Mail-send-receive.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make breaking changes to this {{{1|{{lc:{{NAMESPACE}}}}}}}, move it, change scope, or nominate it for deletion or deprecation, please notify the [[Wikipedia:Article alerts|Article Alerts]] project at [[:en:Wikipedia talk:Article alerts|Wikipedia talk:Article alerts]] as a courtesy, as this page is used by the [[User:AAlertBot|AAlertBot]] bot to detect and report pages. Thank you!}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --></noinclude>
